name: AnnotationListResponse
description: AnnotationListResponse schema from Amplitude Chart Annotations API

id.description: The unique identifier of the annotation.

label.description: The display label for the annotation.

date.description: The start date of the annotation in YYYY-MM-DD format.

end_date.description: The end date of the annotation for date ranges. Null for point-in-time annotations.

details.description: Additional details or notes for the annotation.

category.description: The category of the annotation for organization purposes.

chart_id.description: The ID of the chart the annotation is associated with. Null for project-wide annotations.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the annotation was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the annotation was last updated.
